query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "domainshuttle: freeform open domain subject-driven text-to-video gener" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (d) as it addresses the same domain (text-to-video generation) and measures the dependent variable of "narrative coherence" and "visual quality" in open-domain cinematic synthesis, which are the core mechanisms and empirical goals of the user's "DomainShuttle" follow-up research.
